title: dev-story-26-retry-storm
description:
This is a new concern distinct from the prior sm truncation pattern. Since at least the preceding two watcher intervals and continuing in this window, story 26's dev persona has been retried repeatedly with the same failure outcome: "tests not green after run." In the current window alone, three consecutive dev runs failed between 2026-05-29T18:42:12Z and 2026-05-29T18:43:10Z, corresponding to attempts 6 through 8.

The immediate impact is repeated spend and no visible forward progress on story 26. The three failed runs in this window consumed about $0.15 total and completed in under a minute, so the current cost is non-trivial but not severe; however, the watcher note indicates the same same-story/same-persona failure was already present across the prior two L1 intervals, making this a sustained retry pattern rather than a one-off red test result.

The evidence does not identify a coherent root cause beyond the generic test-red outcome. The error text is ambiguous and could reflect either story-specific code/test issues or a broader dispatch/prompt/runtime pattern, so diagnostic clarity remains limited. Because the retry storm is now sustained across multiple watcher intervals on one story/persona pair, L3 review is warranted to determine whether this is an infrastructure-side loop or a story-local failure mode that the chain is not exiting cleanly.

evidence.summary_excerpt: Story 26 retried repeatedly in this window, with three consecutive dev failures on the same ambiguous "tests not green after run" outcome after two similar failures noted in the prior two watcher intervals.

story 26 dev attempt_n=7 failed after 39.218s; error="tests not green after run"; cost_usd=0.051058; model=azure/deepseek-v4-pro
story 26 dev attempt_n=8 failed after 18.422s; error="tests not green after run"; cost_usd=0.0359115; model=azure/deepseek-v4-pro
{"noteworthy":"Story 26 / dev reached failure_count=3 within about one minute, which meets the retry-storm threshold."}

{"noteworthy":"Three failed dev runs for story 26 occurred in this window with the same ambiguous error, \"tests not green after run\"; prior notes show this same failure pattern was already present in the preceding two intervals."}

escalation_reason: Sustained retry-storm pattern on story 26 / dev: the same ambiguous "tests not green after run" failure persisted across at least three watcher intervals and reached three failures within about one minute in the latest window. L3 judgment is needed because the loop is now persistent, is burning cost without progress, and the evidence does not distinguish story-local test failure from a factory-side retry/dispatch problem.
